pr.title: Non-record: Shared-weight transformer with extended warmdown (1.1454 val_bpb)

output.summary: Shared-core transformer reuses one block across nine passes with U-Net skip feedback and per-layer scaling while probing long warmdown schedules via step-based decay.
techniques: Shared-core recurrent transformer with U-Net skip connections
Per-layer scaling to break symmetry across passes
Step-based warmdown schedule decoupling from wallclock time
